name: Proxyscotch
tagline: A simple proxy server created for https://hoppscotch.io - CORS proxy
description:
A simple proxy server created for https://hoppscotch.io - CORS proxy

Docs: https://github.com/hoppscotch/proxyscotch?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  proxyscotch:
    image: hoppscotch/proxyscotch:v0.1.4
    environment:
      - PROXYSCOTCH_TOKEN=431e45a78865ee93067acc0b857bf424
      - PROXYSCOTCH_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=${ALLOWED_ORIGINS:-*}
      - PROXYSCOTCH_BANNED_OUTPUTS=${BANNED_OUTPUTS}
      - PROXYSCOTCH_BANNED_DESTS=${BANNED_DESTS}
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42098:9159
